title: Veo 3.1 Lite Released
summary: Veo 3.1 Lite is a cost-effective video generation model now available in paid preview. It can be accessed through the Gemini API and tested in Google AI Studio.
body:
Veo 3.1 Lite, the latest video generation model from Google AI, has been released in paid preview. This model is designed to be more cost-effective than its predecessors, making it accessible to a wider range of developers and businesses. The model can be integrated into applications using the Gemini API, allowing for seamless video generation capabilities.

 The release of Veo 3.1 Lite is significant as it provides an affordable solution for video content creation. This can be particularly useful for small businesses, startups, and individual creators who want to produce high-quality video content without breaking the bank. Additionally, the model's availability in Google AI Studio allows developers to test and experiment with its capabilities, exploring new use cases and applications.

 As Veo 3.1 Lite becomes more widely adopted, it will be interesting to see how it impacts the video content creation landscape. Will it democratize access to high-quality video production, or will it raise new concerns about deepfakes and synthetic media? Only time will tell, but for now, developers and creators can start exploring the possibilities of Veo 3.1 Lite through the Gemini API and Google AI Studio.
twitterThread: 🚀 Introducing Veo 3.1 Lite, the cost-effective video generation model from Google AI! 🤖
Here's why this matters: Veo 3.1 Lite makes high-quality video content creation accessible to small businesses and individual creators.
The wild part: Veo 3.1 Lite can be integrated into applications using the Gemini API, allowing for seamless video generation capabilities.
Let that sink in: with Veo 3.1 Lite, you can generate high-quality video content without breaking the bank.
This changes everything for video content creators. Get ready to see a new wave of innovative and engaging video content!
standaloneTweet: Veo 3.1 Lite is here! 🚀 Google AI's latest video generation model is now available in paid preview, making high-quality video content creation more accessible than ever. Read more: https://ainformed.dev/articles/veo-3-1-lite-released
